findings.message: apiVersion 'Apps/v1' looks malformed (group must be lowercase, version like v1, v1alpha1, etc.)
replicaScheduling is misplaced; move it under spec.placement.replicaScheduling
field 'association' is deprecated in favor of 'propagateDeps'
path '$.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image' is JSONPath; OverridePolicy requires JSON Pointer (RFC 6901, starts with '/')
